name: Deviled Ham
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Cubed firm fat from cooked ham
1 1/2 tablespoons Horseradish Mustard or other hot mustard
A big pinch of grated nutmeg
A small pinch of ground cloves
4 Drops Pepper Sherry or bottled hot pepper sauce
A big pinch of ground pepper
A big pinch of ground ginger
A big pinch of ground thyme
recipeInstructions:
1. Grind the ham and fat fairly fine, either in a food processor or, in two batches, in an electric blender.
2. If using a processor, add the remaining ingredients all at once and process until the mixture is rather like a coarse pate. If using a blender, scrape the first batch of ground ham into a bowl, add the seasonings, process the rest of the ham, and combine with the mixture in the bowl. If too coarse, process again in two batches.
3. Taste for seasoning, then pack into a jar, cover, and refrigerate overnight or longer to let the flavors mingle. The spread will keep for up to 2 weeks.
